Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All basic metabolic and renal parameters are within normal limits. Glycemic control is adequate. Lipid profile shows elevated total and LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Recommend lipid-lowering therapy and lifestyle modification. No evidence of renal dysfunction or microalbuminuria. Regular follow-up advised.
